contexts.context: ...have 0425 arrived in the meantime.  But the green <mark>shutters</mark> were closed 0426 and there was no one about...
...it in the chink between 0430 the door´s <mark>shutters</mark>, and he was still barking as I shut...
...something consoling to hold on to. 1620      The green <mark>shutters</mark> on the door at Kirchstetten were closed, 1621...
